canonical_definition: The latent trait encompassing the aesthetic quality of text generated by LLMs, including readability, visual organization, consistency of style, and logical coherence, which contributes to user engagement and comprehension.
papers: Unmasking Deceptive Visuals: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models on Misleading Chart Question Answering
Warm Up Before You Train: Unlocking General Reasoning in Resource-Constrained Settings

definitions.text: The systematic visual arrangement of text elements such as headings, subheadings, and lists to guide the reader effectively.
definitions.paper: Unmasking Deceptive Visuals: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models on Misleading Chart Question Answering

definitions.text: The latent ability of a presentation to exhibit harmonious colors, proper layout, and visually appealing elements that enhance readability and engagement.
